n: Chapter 4: Enemies in the Ever Dark

steps.t: Katûb-zahar, the Word-hoard of Durin, is on the eastern side of the Great Delving, north of a large statue of Durin. Bori has asked you to return to K…
Bori is in the Chamber of Command, the room up the eastern stairs in the Chamber of the Cross-roads, at the southern entrance to Durin's Way, north of…
